subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Taqi! Upon thee be My glory! Hearken unto My call from round about My prison. Verily, there is no God but Him, the Mighty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد تقی علیک بهائی اسمع ندائی من حول سجنی انه لا اله الا هو العزیز
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @chastisement and requital
